content.rendered:
Summer is here, bringing a new issue of IFR Magazine!

Find the Summer 2025 edition of IFR Magazine in Helijet Terminals, onboard the aircraft, or at some fine local Hotel partners.

In This Issue:

  • Get hot Tourism Tips from local Concierge in the Insiders Guide.
  • Rev your engines and explore the world of high-performance driving.
  • Find Dark Sky destinations for indulge in some summer star-gazing.
  • Sustainable Travel tips that can have a big impact.
  • Find out What’s On in Vancouver, Victoria and Nanaimo this Season.
